name: afa-ai-workflow-template
description: Submission template for the AFA 2027 Special Session on Papers Written with Generative AI Workflows. Bundles four submission-tracking skills (init-submission, log-conversation, log-human-time, contribution-report), one calibration skill, six Corbis-powered research skills (literature review, positioning, landscape, idea generation, idea screening, citation verification), matching slash commands, a paper-reader subagent, and the Corbis MCP server.
